title: Sans The Skeleton: An Origins Resource Pack
description: This is required to use my Sans Origins Mod!
body:
The Skeleton: The Weakest Origin

This resourse pack brings Sans The Skeleton in the world of minecraft.

You only have one heart, no defense. With that, how do you expect to survive the world? Defend yourself with the power of bones and gaster blasters! Judge mobs and their actions with your ability to inflict KARMA on others. Target their very soul in order to get an upper hand and be able to control and throw people around. Throw bones that do only 1 damage..? But they bypass Iframes!! Thats huge! You aren't sans right at the beginning. You must train, dodge, and work yourself down to the bone in order to master San's abilities. With a mysterious helper guiding you through your missions. This pack is required to use when playing my sans origins mod for fabric! This will bring Gaster Blasters, bones, hearts, and more into your world when using my Sans mod
